description: Style Noteenamor is a brand that has become synonymous with femininity, style and luxury. Give your lingerie drawer a quirky twist with this lacy piece from the brand. Its blended composition ensures a snug and comfortable Fit.Product DetailsBeige briefs, lace front panel, elasticized waist with bow in front, soft fabric panel inlay at crotch, stretchableMaterial and CareNylon, polyamide and elastaneHand wash warmDrip dry in shadeSize and FitLow riseThe model( height 5'8"and waist 28") is wearing a size M
